examples: Thermal activation is a good method to increase the amount of 4-coordinated al and to improve gelatification activation of gangue.
Pectin with high molecular weight can be used to prepare supersonic centrifuge membrane and electric osmotic membrane because of its better gelatification.
The resistance and mass transfer property of ultrafiltration are analyzed, and the modified model of gelatification and polarization is established for the ultrafiltration process.
